summary: Create a batch of BIM Model Revision Viewpoints
description: Create relationships between several BIM Model Revisions and BIM Viewpoints.

items.description: BIM Model Revision Viewpoint associates BIM Model Revisions to BIM Viewpoint

bim_model_revision_id.description: ID of associated published BIM Model Revision

bim_model_revision_viewpoints.description: An array of BIM Model Revision Viewpoint payloads

bim_viewpoint_id.description: BIM Viewpoint ID. The BIM Viewpoint should be associated to the same BIM File as the BIM Model Revision

primary.description: Flag to indicate whether this is primary viewpoint for the model revision. There can only be one primary viewpoint per model revision
